Package tif

Classes for parsing and manipulating TIFF-based files.

See: Description

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    TifMetadataProvider
    Provides an specialised interface for accessing and managing TIFF-based metadata structures.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    DirectoryIFD
    A collection-based representation of a TIFF Image File Directory (IFD).
    DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD
    Represents a single metadata entry within an Image File Directory.
    GpsDataManager  
    IFDHandler
    This handler performs the heavy lifting of parsing TIFF-based metadata structures (Standard TIFF, EXIF in JPEGs, and DNG) by interpreting Image File Directories (IFDs).
    RationalNumber
    This class represents a rational number, typically used in the TIFF/EXIF image format.
    TagValueConverter
    Utility class for converting DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD values into human-readable or numeric forms.
    TiffDatePatcher
    Performs in-place "surgical patching" of specific timestamp entries.
    TifMetadata
    A container for storing information on extracted TIFF-based metadata, including EXIF and XMP segments.
    TifParser
    A concrete implementation of AbstractImageParser for extracting metadata from TIFF files.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    DirectoryIdentifier
    Enumerates and identifies Image File Directory (IFD) types found within TIFF and EXIF data structures.
    RationalNumber.DataType  
    TagHint  
    TifFieldType
    An enumeration class of data format types defined in the TIFF specification 6.0 document.

Package tif Description

Classes for parsing and manipulating TIFF-based files.

Supports standard TIFF parsing, including tag extraction, IFD navigation, and metadata analysis.

Since:
1 August 2025
Author:
Trevor Maggs
